name: Activision Blizzard, Inc.
description: Activision Blizzard, Inc. is a leading global developer and publisher of interactive entertainment content and services. The company operates through three primary segments: Activision Publishing, Blizzard Entertainment, and King Digital Entertainment. It is renowned for creating and distributing some of the world's most iconic and successful gaming franchises, including Call of Duty, World of Warcraft, Diablo, Overwatch, and Candy Crush. Headquartered in Santa Monica, California, the company was acquired by Microsoft Corporation in October 2023.
